description: Comprehensive token-driven motion system for ERP design system. Defines animation durations, easing curves, and motion patterns for consistent micro-interactions and transitions.

instant.usage: Immediate state changes where no animation is needed

fast.usage: Micro-interactions, hover feedback, focus indicators, small element animations

normal.usage: Standard transitions, panel open/close, visibility changes, modal dismiss

slow.usage: Page transitions, complex multi-step animations, navigation between views

xslow.usage: Dramatic reveals, onboarding animations, hero sections, cinematic effects

standard.name: Material Standard
standard.usage: Default easing for most transitions and animations
standard.curve: Accelerates quickly, decelerates smoothly at end

decelerate.name: Material Decelerate
decelerate.usage: Elements entering the screen from outside, appearing from nothing
decelerate.curve: Fast start, slow finish - gives sense of landing

accelerate.name: Material Accelerate
accelerate.usage: Elements leaving the screen or disappearing, exiting the viewport
accelerate.curve: Slow start, fast finish - gives sense of departure

spring.name: Spring/Bouncy
spring.usage: Playful, bouncy motions for celebratory or delightful interactions
spring.curve: Elastic rebound with slight overshoot at end

sharp.name: Sharp
sharp.usage: Attention-grabbing, snappy interactions that feel responsive

sm.usage: Small movements for button presses, subtle reveals

md.usage: Standard movement for panel slides, modest reveals, default transforms

lg.usage: Larger movement for navigation transitions, significant reveals

xl.usage: Dramatic movement for hero animations, cinematic effects

full.usage: Full viewport movement for complete transitions

fade-in-subtle.usage: Very subtle fade for secondary content or backgrounds

fade-in-moderate.usage: Standard fade for content appearing, hover states, secondary actions

fade-in-full.usage: Complete opacity change for primary content, modals, full visibility

xs.usage: Minimal scale change for button press depression or subtle emphasis

sm.usage: Small scale change for card interactions or modest zoom effects

md.usage: Moderate scale increase for emphasis, hover states, or zoom-in effects

lg.usage: Larger scale change for attention-grabbing, zoom transitions

xl.usage: Dramatic scale change for cinematic effects, celebratory animations

xs.usage: Minimal delay for staggered animations within components

sm.usage: Small delay for sequential item animations (lists, grids)

md.usage: Standard delay for staggered content reveals or cascading animations

lg.usage: Larger delay for multi-phase animations or dialog sequences

xl.usage: Significant delay for dramatic timing effects or attention direction

patterns.name: Page Transition - Standard
patterns.description: Transition between full page views with slide and fade effect

enter.description: Page slides up slightly while fading in

exit.description: Current page fades out and slides up

patterns.cssExample: animation: pageEnter normal decelerate forwards; @keyframes pageEnter { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }

patterns.name: Page Transition - Slide Right
patterns.description: Transition sliding page from left to right (typically for back navigation)

enter.description: New page slides in from left

exit.description: Previous page slides right and fades slightly

patterns.name: Modal Entrance
patterns.description: Modal or dialog appears with fade and scale effect

content.description: Modal scales up from 95% to 100% while fading in

patterns.name: Modal Exit
patterns.description: Modal or dialog disappears with fade and scale effect

content.description: Modal scales down to 95% while fading out

patterns.name: Dropdown Menu Expand
patterns.description: Dropdown menu slides down and fades in

menu.description: Menu expands from origin point while fading in

patterns.name: Dropdown Menu Collapse
patterns.description: Dropdown menu slides up and fades out

menu.description: Menu collapses to origin point while fading out

patterns.name: Button Hover State
patterns.description: Button responds to hover with background change and elevation increase

patterns.name: Button Press/Active State
patterns.description: Button responds to press with scale and ripple effect

ripple.change: Ripple effect radiates from click point

patterns.name: Focus Ring Appearance
patterns.description: Focus ring appears around interactive element when keyboard focused

patterns.name: Focus Ring Disappearance
patterns.description: Focus ring disappears when element loses focus

patterns.name: Checkbox Toggle Animation
patterns.description: Checkbox animates when toggled with scale and checkmark animation

checkmark.description: Checkmark appears with bouncy spring animation

patterns.name: Radio Button Selection
patterns.description: Radio button animates when selected with fill animation

inner.description: Selected indicator appears with spring bounce

patterns.name: Toggle Switch Flip
patterns.description: Toggle switch animates thumb sliding to new position

patterns.name: Loading Spinner Rotation
patterns.description: Continuous rotating spinner for loading states

patterns.name: Progress Bar Fill Animation
patterns.description: Progress bar animates as progress value increases

patterns.name: Skeleton Shimmer Effect
patterns.description: Shimmer effect on skeleton loading placeholder

patterns.name: Snackbar Slide Up
patterns.description: Snackbar slides up from bottom with fade effect

patterns.name: Snackbar Slide Down
patterns.description: Snackbar slides down and disappears

exit.description: Snackbar slides down out of view

patterns.name: Toast Slide In
patterns.description: Toast notification slides in from top

patterns.name: Toast Slide Out
patterns.description: Toast notification slides away

exit.description: Toast slides up out of view

patterns.name: Drawer Slide In
patterns.description: Navigation drawer slides in from side with backdrop fade

drawer.description: Drawer slides in from left or right

patterns.name: Drawer Slide Out
patterns.description: Navigation drawer slides out with backdrop fade

drawer.description: Drawer slides out to left or right

patterns.name: Bottom Sheet Slide Up
patterns.description: Bottom sheet slides up from bottom with backdrop

patterns.name: Bottom Sheet Slide Down
patterns.description: Bottom sheet slides down and disappears

sheet.description: Sheet slides down out of view

patterns.name: Expand/Collapse Animation
patterns.description: Content expands or collapses with smooth height animation

patterns.name: Notification Badge Pulse
patterns.description: Badge pulses to draw attention to notifications

pulse.keyframes: 0% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); } 50% { opacity: 0.7; transform: scale(1.1); } 100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }

patterns.name: Floating Action Button Entrance
patterns.description: FAB scales and fades in from bottom-right

enter.description: FAB bounces in with spring animation

patterns.name: Speed Dial Menu Expansion
patterns.description: Speed dial menu items rotate and scale in sequence

items.change: Each item scales and fades in with staggered delay
items.description: Items appear in sequence with spring animation

patterns.name: List Item Staggered Entrance
patterns.description: List items fade and slide in with staggered timing

items.description: Each item appears in sequence from top

patterns.name: Error Shake Animation
patterns.description: Element shakes to indicate error

patterns.name: Success Celebration Animation
patterns.description: Celebratory animation for successful completion

patterns.name: AI Response Streaming Animation
patterns.description: Animated indicator showing AI response is being generated

cursor.description: Blinking cursor at end of message

patterns.name: AI Response Completion Flash
patterns.description: Flash effect when AI response completes and appears fully

flash.description: Brief highlight flash on message completion

patterns.name: Form Input Focus State
patterns.description: Form input responds to focus with border color and shadow change

patterns.name: Form Field Validation Success
patterns.description: Form field shows success state with checkmark animation

patterns.name: Form Field Validation Error
patterns.description: Form field shows error state with shake and color change

patterns.name: Tooltip Appear
patterns.description: Tooltip fades and scales in near trigger element

patterns.name: Tooltip Disappear
patterns.description: Tooltip fades and scales out

patterns.name: Popover Appear
patterns.description: Popover fades and slides in from trigger element

patterns.name: Popover Disappear
patterns.description: Popover fades and slides out

patterns.name: Badge Alert Pulse
patterns.description: Badge pulses with color emphasis for alerts or critical updates

patterns.name: Parallax Scroll Effect
patterns.description: Background elements move slower than foreground during scroll

parallax.change: Y position based on scroll velocity
parallax.description: Depth effect from differential scroll speeds

patterns.name: Image Reveal Animation
patterns.description: Image reveals with crossfade or slide from placeholder

patterns.name: Data Grid Row Selection
patterns.description: Data grid row highlights smoothly when selected

patterns.name: Menu Item Hover State
patterns.description: Menu item highlights on hover with smooth transition

prefersReducedMotion.strategy: Remove transform animations (translate, scale, rotate), keep opacity changes, use instant durations
prefersReducedMotion.exceptions: Loading spinners and critical feedback still use minimal animation
prefersReducedMotion.testing: Always test with prefers-reduced-motion enabled in system settings

vestibularDisorders.recommendation: Never use parallax, large-scale transforms, or continuous rotation for decorative purposes
specificGuidelines: No rapid flashing or strobing (>3 flashes per second)
No continuous spinning for decorative elements

visuallyImpaired.screenReader: All animated state changes must be announced via ARIA live regions
visuallyImpaired.contrast: Animated elements must maintain sufficient color contrast before, during, and after animation
visuallyImpaired.duration: Animations should not be so fast that content is missed (minimum 200ms for perceivable animations)

cognitiveLoadReduction.guidance: Too many simultaneous animations can overwhelm users
cognitiveLoadReduction.maxSimultaneous: Limit to 1-2 animations at same time
cognitiveLoadReduction.staggering: Stagger animations to present information sequentially
cognitiveLoadReduction.clarity: Animations must clarify relationships, not obscure content

button.loading: Kept in active state, parent may show loading spinner

input-field.blur: Border color fade back to default

radio-button.unselected-to-selected: radio-button-select (dot scales in with spring animation)

slider.drag: Thumb follows drag with smooth motion, tooltip appears/updates
slider.release: If snap-to-value, snap animation with decelerate easing

select.open: dropdown-expand on desktop; bottom-sheet-slide on mobile
select.close: dropdown-collapse on desktop; bottom-sheet-slide-down on mobile

date-picker.open: modal-entrance on desktop; bottom-sheet-slide on mobile
date-picker.close: modal-exit on desktop; bottom-sheet-slide-down on mobile
date-picker.month-navigation: Smooth fade and slide between months

time-picker.open: modal-entrance on desktop; bottom-sheet-slide on mobile
time-picker.close: modal-exit on desktop; bottom-sheet-slide-down on mobile
time-picker.wheel-spin: Smooth rotation of picker wheel values

modal.backdrop: Fades in and out with modal

card.hover: button-hover (elevation increase and subtle background change)
card.active: card has tap actions, tap-reveal reveals them

accordion.collapse-previous: If single-open, previous panel collapses as new opens

context-menu.appear: popover-enter (appear near cursor or tap point)

snackbar.autoExit: After timeout, automatically triggers exit animation

toast.autoExit: After timeout, automatically triggers exit animation

bottom-sheet.swipe-dismiss: Spring physics for natural swipe-to-dismiss gesture

drawer.open: drawer-slide-in (slide from side with backdrop fade)
drawer.close: drawer-slide-out (slide to side with backdrop fade)
drawer.swipe-dismiss: Spring physics for natural swipe gesture

FAB.enter: fab-entrance (scale and fade in with spring animation)
FAB.hover: Subtle scale increase (1.05x) and shadow elevation

speed-dial.open: fab-speed-dial (items rotate and scale in sequence)
speed-dial.close: fab-speed-dial (items rotate and scale out, FAB icon rotates back)

list.render: list-item-stagger (items fade and slide in with delays)

list-item.swipe-action: Swipe reveals leading or trailing actions

data-grid.scroll: Momentum scroll, optional parallax on headers

table.sort-change: Sorted column animates slightly (pulse or emphasize)

tag.hover: Background highlight and remove icon appears

chip.remove: Scale out when delete icon tapped

map.zoom: Smooth zoom with decelerate easing on pinch complete

chart.render: Values animate from 0 to final with staggered timing

timeline.event-click: Event details appear with modal-entrance animation

skeleton-loader.replace: Skeleton fades out, content fades in (crossfade)

segmented-control.switch: Indicator slides to new position with smooth easing

header.sticky: No animation, but smooth scroll behavior

footer.sticky: No animation, but smooth scroll behavior

dialog-title.appear: Fades in with dialog entrance animation

dialog-content.appear: Slight delay (50-100ms) after title, then fades in

dialog-actions.appear: Slight delay (100-150ms) after content, then fade in

form.error: Form shake if global error; individual fields shake on validation

css.description: Pure CSS animations using @keyframes and transition properties
css.limitations: Limited to predefined duration, difficulty with dynamic values

javascript.description: JavaScript-driven animations with Web Animations API or libraries
javascript.advantages: Full control, dynamic values, complex sequencing
javascript.limitations: Slightly heavier performance impact, requires polyfills for older browsers

library.description: Third-party animation library (Framer Motion, React Spring, etc.)
library.advantages: Intuitive API, easy sequencing, gesture support

gpuAcceleration.recommendation: Use transform and opacity for animations (GPU-accelerated)
avoid: Animating width/height directly (use transform: scale instead)
Animating color (use opacity with pre-rendered colors)

willChange.guidance: Use will-change: transform; on elements about to animate
willChange.caution: Remove will-change after animation completes to avoid memory overhead

renderOptimization.staggering: Stagger list animations to avoid too many simultaneous renders
renderOptimization.virtualization: For long lists, virtualize off-screen items to avoid animating unseen elements

bestPractices.consistency: Use the same motion pattern for the same interaction type across entire app
bestPractices.meaning: Motion should convey spatial relationships and state changes, not distract
bestPractices.restraint: Use motion sparingly and purposefully; not every interaction needs animation
bestPractices.feedback: Always provide immediate visual feedback for user interactions
bestPractices.hierarchy: Quick micro-interactions for secondary feedback; slower animations for primary navigation
bestPractices.testing: Test animations with prefers-reduced-motion enabled and on lower-end devices
bestPractices.a11y: Always provide non-motion alternatives and test with screen readers
